name: thon09-admin-system
description: Frontend checks for He thong Quan Ly Hanh Chinh Thon 09.

scripts.check:js: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process'),path=require('path');let failed=false;function walk(d){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const p=path.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory())walk(p);else if(p.endsWith('.js')){const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',p],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status)failed=true;}}}walk('assets/js');process.exit(failed?1:0)"
